description: An admissions clerk needs to process the admission for a patient who is being moved from the Emergency Department (ED) to an inpatient medical-surgical unit.

nodes.task_description: Receive the admission order from the ED physician and identify the patient's record.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the patient's existing ED encounter in the EHR.

nodes.task_description: Find an available bed on the designated medical-surgical unit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent uses the bed management tool to locate and assign an available bed.

nodes.task_description: Process the ADT message in the system to change the patient's status from 'outpatient' to 'inpatient' and assign them to the new unit and bed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully processes the admission, and the patient's location is updated throughout the hospital's systems.
